headline: Valero Energy: An Oil Refiner That Will Grow Even With An Open Strait of Hormuz
summary: Valero Energy is positioned to benefit from macro tailwinds regardless of Strait of Hormuz outcomes. Check out why VLO stock is a strong buy.
